description: Style NoteGet dressed in these sandals from catwalk for a wonderful casual look. The buckle design lends a dose of stylishness to your look, making this pair a must have in your wardrobe.Product DetailsSandal with midfoot straps in olive with a buckle design and a toe separatorSmooth footbedTextured TPU outsole with branded grooves on the forefoot and a floral shaped upraised heelMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe with a clean cloth to remove dustDo not store under sunlight
